description: This pipeline applies image enhancement and feature extraction to input images. The main steps include enhancing the images, extracting features from the enhanced images, and then outputting the extracted features.

d6efebd6-e889-43a6-9b1a-e2120e911f1a.name: generate-unique-annotation
d6efebd6-e889-43a6-9b1a-e2120e911f1a.description: Generates a unique annotation for each row based on its index. The annotations will have the format (Base name)[(row index)]

cf8ba4f6-d7dc-4545-a748-30a4d9e1550d.name: ij1-math-math2d
cf8ba4f6-d7dc-4545-a748-30a4d9e1550d.description: Applies a mathematical operation to each pixel. Supported operations are SET, ADD, SUBTRACT, MULTIPLY, DIVIDE, GAMMA, MINIMUM, MAXIMUM, LOGICAL OR, LOGICAL AND, and LOGICAL XOR. We recommend to use 'Fast image arithmetics' instead.

817e44be-fd22-4874-80c3-3c370ff24346.name: ij1-morph-operation2d
817e44be-fd22-4874-80c3-3c370ff24346.description:
Applies a morphological operation to greyscale images. Following operations are included: Erosion, Dilation, Opening, Closing, White Top Hat, Black Top Hat, Gradient, Laplacian, Internal Gradient, and External Gradient. More information (including examples) can be found at https://imagej.net/MorphoLibJ.html
If a multi-channel image is provided, the operation is applied to each channel. If higher-dimensional data is provided, the filter is applied to each 2D slice.

59f6f6ba-febf-43ad-b47f-095c6e595237.name: cellpose-2
59f6f6ba-febf-43ad-b47f-095c6e595237.description:
Deprecated. Use the node with the same name.

Runs Cellpose on the input image. This node supports both segmentation in 3D and executing Cellpose for each 2D image plane. This node can generate a multitude of outputs, although only ROI is activated by default. Go to the 'Outputs' parameter section to enable the other outputs.
  • Labels: A grayscale image where each connected component is assigned a unique value.
  • Flows XY: An RGB image that indicates the x and y flow of each pixel
  • Flows Z: Flows in Z direction (black for non-3D images)
  • Flows d: Multi-channel image that contains the flows [dZ, dY, dX, cell probability] (3D images) / [dY, dX, cell probability] (2D images)
  • Probabilities: An image indicating the cell probabilities for each pixel
  • ROI: ROI of the segmented areas.
Please note that you need to setup a valid Python environment with Cellpose installed. You can find the setting in Project > Application settings > Extensions > Cellpose.

This algorithm merges all annotations and data annotations. Use the iteration step settings to determine how annotations and data annotations are merged

6ba646c5-354a-4fff-b2d7-43bb43870639.name: ij1-morph-operation2d
6ba646c5-354a-4fff-b2d7-43bb43870639.description:
Applies a morphological operation to greyscale images. Following operations are included: Erosion, Dilation, Opening, Closing, White Top Hat, Black Top Hat, Gradient, Laplacian, Internal Gradient, and External Gradient. More information (including examples) can be found at https://imagej.net/MorphoLibJ.html
If a multi-channel image is provided, the operation is applied to each channel. If higher-dimensional data is provided, the filter is applied to each 2D slice.

fba9707e-2f52-4f45-b58e-451bc10cb876.name: ij1-morph-operation2d
fba9707e-2f52-4f45-b58e-451bc10cb876.description:
Applies a morphological operation to greyscale images. Following operations are included: Erosion, Dilation, Opening, Closing, White Top Hat, Black Top Hat, Gradient, Laplacian, Internal Gradient, and External Gradient. More information (including examples) can be found at https://imagej.net/MorphoLibJ.html
If a multi-channel image is provided, the operation is applied to each channel. If higher-dimensional data is provided, the filter is applied to each 2D slice.

535f14df-f192-4a47-a7d0-f2101644f0ef.name: ij1-roi-to-rgb
535f14df-f192-4a47-a7d0-f2101644f0ef.description:
Converts ROI lists to masks. The line and fill color is stored within the ROI themselves. This algorithm needs a reference image that provides the output sizes. If you do not have a reference image, you can use the unreferenced variant.

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.

117a0b2c-8a1a-4c3b-826d-cfb13db65436.name: ij1-roi-set-properties
117a0b2c-8a1a-4c3b-826d-cfb13db65436.description: Sets properties of all Roi to a user-defined value.

7bb4bae0-509b-49cf-aa0e-153b24590c18.name: ij1-morph-operation2d
7bb4bae0-509b-49cf-aa0e-153b24590c18.description:
Applies a morphological operation to greyscale images. Following operations are included: Erosion, Dilation, Opening, Closing, White Top Hat, Black Top Hat, Gradient, Laplacian, Internal Gradient, and External Gradient. More information (including examples) can be found at https://imagej.net/MorphoLibJ.html
If a multi-channel image is provided, the operation is applied to each channel. If higher-dimensional data is provided, the filter is applied to each 2D slice.

ed336eea-9524-4a11-af3c-71fa8c2f7c7c.name: ij1-blur-median2d
ed336eea-9524-4a11-af3c-71fa8c2f7c7c.description: Applies a median filter. If a multi-channel image is provided, the operation is applied to each channel. If higher-dimensional data is provided, the filter is applied to each 2D slice.

23e7a362-a37c-4c8d-baa6-610cd4dd7226.name: ij1-dimensions-reorder
23e7a362-a37c-4c8d-baa6-610cd4dd7226.description: Reorders dimensions of hyperstacks. This for example allows you to switch the depth and time axis. If a stack is provided, it is interpreted as hyperstack with depth and with one frame and one channel. 2D images are ignored and passed to the output without processing.

c9b96472-4b0f-4610-9d6c-b5ff7c948d4c.name: ij1-threshold-manual2d-8u
c9b96472-4b0f-4610-9d6c-b5ff7c948d4c.description: Thresholds the image with a manual threshold. If higher-dimensional data is provided, the filter is applied to each 2D slice.

6b0735c5-7ee4-4ecd-9aba-9cfe8b389593.name: ij1-analyze-find-particles2d
6b0735c5-7ee4-4ecd-9aba-9cfe8b389593.description: Converts mask images into ROI by applying a connected components algorithm and generates measurements. Please note that this algorithm will always trace the external object boundaries and convert them into polygonal ROIs. This means that holes will be closed. This node requires a thresholded image as input and will extract measurements from the thresholded image. If you already have ROI available and want measurements, use 'Extract ROI statistics'.If higher-dimensional data is provided, the results are generated for each 2D slice.

4c46d13f-8a90-46ad-a757-fd9a37db8e22.name: annotate-set-single
4c46d13f-8a90-46ad-a757-fd9a37db8e22.description: Sets a single annotation. The name and the value are determined by expressions

7505a194-2450-40fd-8564-ab4abe9b1225.name: ij1-morph-operation2d
7505a194-2450-40fd-8564-ab4abe9b1225.description:

More information (including examples) can be found at https://imagej.net/MorphoLibJ.html

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.

b2ed58b3-6c0c-4b9e-82ad-1d7e8189b0e8.name: weka-classification-2d
b2ed58b3-6c0c-4b9e-82ad-1d7e8189b0e8.description:
Classifies an image with a Weka model. If higher-dimensional data is provided, the classification is applied per slice. To obtain ROI from the generated labels, utilize the 'Labels to ROI' node.

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.

d6748a27-4fd4-49b0-8537-d2785d630144.description: Thresholds the image with a manual threshold. If higher-dimensional data is provided, the filter is applied to each 2D slice.

96fc2483-1424-4a27-b75d-500a2d13775f.name: ij1-blur-gaussian2d
96fc2483-1424-4a27-b75d-500a2d13775f.description: Applies convolution with a Gaussian function for smoothing. If higher-dimensional data is provided, the filter is applied to each 2D slice.

fbb1a58c-47d9-4c60-bef2-9f90b12ab646.name: ij1-contrast-histogram-enhancer
fbb1a58c-47d9-4c60-bef2-9f90b12ab646.description: Implementation of the ImageJ contrast enhancer feature that uses histograms and normalization methods.

7414a810-97a8-43bf-8a93-addfeb999fc3.name: ij1-roi-to-mask
7414a810-97a8-43bf-8a93-addfeb999fc3.description:

c565e136-8034-4f88-8414-46b5f5b90c95.name: ij1-contrast-illumination-correction2d
c565e136-8034-4f88-8414-46b5f5b90c95.description: Applies a Gaussian filter to the image and extracts the maximum value. Pixel values are then divided by this value.If higher-dimensional data is provided, the filter is applied to each 2D slice.

Please note that this algorithm will always trace the external object boundaries and convert them into polygonal ROIs. This means that holes will be closed. If you already have ROI available and want measurements, use 'Extract ROI statistics'.If higher-dimensional data is provided, the results are generated for each 2D slice.

ec7b2439-232e-48fc-979b-ca7c7450d642.name: weka-training-roi-2d
ec7b2439-232e-48fc-979b-ca7c7450d642.description:
Trains a Weka model on 2D image data. The inputs are ROI that are assigned to the classes and trained on the input image. Can only train on a single image. Please convert ROI to labels/masks and use the appropriate nodes if you want to train on multiple images.

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.

6576c3bb-b23a-470a-b21d-e428455f3b29.name: ij1-blur-gaussian2d
6576c3bb-b23a-470a-b21d-e428455f3b29.description: Applies convolution with a Gaussian function for smoothing. If higher-dimensional data is provided, the filter is applied to each 2D slice.

3fb5ced8-948e-42a7-a7ed-966b55d480e6.name: ij1-background-rollingball2d
3fb5ced8-948e-42a7-a7ed-966b55d480e6.description: Finds or subtracts the background of a 2D slice via a rolling-ball or paraboloid algorithm. If higher-dimensional data is provided, the filter is applied to each 2D slice.
